positive: A mystical, minimalist composition featuring a stylized celestial animal, perhaps a zodiac griffin or a nebula fox, soaring over an abstract landscape of crystal mountains and luminous smoke. The silhouette must be clean and highly defined, suitable for monochrome screen printing. Style: Art Deco meets cosmic Surrealism, utilizing crisp line work and flat planes of color. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting to emphasize edges and form (rim lighting). Color palette: Deep indigo, electric sapphire, muted golds, and stark white accents. Composition: Centralized, symmetrical, highly decorative, and balanced for apparel printing. Details: Perfect vector quality, high contrast, linocut aesthetic, graphic novel illustration.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifact, deformed, noise, text, signature, watermark, gradient, photorealistic, 3d render, complex background, bad anatomy, ugly
